---
name: Security or safety concern
about: Report a security issue or safety-critical problem without exploit details
title: "[SECURITY/SAFETY] "
labels: security, safety
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the concern without posting sensitive exploit details.

## Type

- [ ] Secret/token exposure
- [ ] Dependency vulnerability
- [ ] Keystore/signing issue
- [ ] Unsafe user-data handling
- [ ] Medication calculation safety issue
- [ ] Route/dose display safety issue
- [ ] Other

## Affected Area

Example:

```text
src/logic/doseCalculator.ts
src/data/medications.ts
Release APK
```

## Impact

What could happen if this is not fixed?

## Reproduction Summary

Give a high-level reproduction summary.

Do not include private credentials, tokens, or exploit code.

## Suggested Fix

Optional.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots or logs if safe to share.
